name: Quiz
description: Short assessment covering recent topics, typically 10-20 minutes

name: Test
description: Comprehensive assessment covering multiple topics or chapters

name: Exam
description: Major assessment covering extensive curriculum content

name: Assignment
description: Written work or projects assigned to be completed outside of class

name: Attendance
description: Monitoring student presence and participation in class

name: Project
description: Extended assignment requiring research, creativity, or practical application

name: Presentation
description: Oral presentation or demonstration of knowledge or skills

name: Participation
description: Active engagement and contribution during class activities

name: Homework
description: Daily or weekly assignments to reinforce classroom learning

name: Discussion
description: Participation in class discussions, debates, or collaborative activities

name: Practical
description: Hands-on application of skills in laboratory or workshop settings

name: Final Grade
description: Overall grade representing cumulative performance for the course
